_docs.purpose: Single source of truth for all advertising on Rochdale Daily. Edit this file through the GitHub web interface; the site updates on the next deploy. Expired ads drop out automatically; empty slots fall back to the built-in 'Advertise here' placeholders. Deleting an ad here never deletes its click/impression history from the tracker.
_docs.orientation_rule: Match the creative to the slot: horizontal banners go in leaderboard/billboard slots; square, portrait or tall creatives go in article-mrec or article-incontent. Any image is letterboxed within the slot's height limit - never cropped or stretched - so a wrongly shaped creative looks small, not broken.

slots.home-leaderboard: Homepage top banner. HORIZONTAL: 728x90 or 970x90 (mobile 320x50 via image_mobile). Renders up to 120px tall.
slots.home-billboard: Homepage lower banner. HORIZONTAL: 970x250 (mobile 300x250). Renders up to 280px tall.
slots.article-leaderboard: Top of every article. HORIZONTAL: 728x90 (mobile 320x50). Renders up to 120px tall.
slots.article-mrec: Article sidebar. RECTANGLE or VERTICAL: 300x250, or 300x600 skyscraper. Renders up to 620px tall.
slots.article-incontent: Inside article body. RECTANGLE: 300x250 or 580x250. Renders up to 280px tall.

placement_fields.id: Unique, permanent, lowercase-with-hyphens, e.g. 'acme-plumbing-2026-07'. Used in tracking URLs and reports - never reuse an id, even after an ad ends.
placement_fields.slot: One of the slot names above.
placement_fields.advertiser: Business name, shown in your performance reports.
placement_fields.image: Path under /assets/ads/, e.g. /assets/ads/acme-728x90.png (upload the image to that folder first).
placement_fields.image_mobile: Optional smaller creative for phones, e.g. /assets/ads/acme-320x50.png
placement_fields.url: The advertiser's landing page. Clicks are tracked by the Worker then redirected here.
placement_fields.alt: Accessible description, e.g. 'Acme Plumbing - emergency callouts across Rochdale'.
placement_fields.start: First day the ad shows, YYYY-MM-DD, inclusive.
placement_fields.end: Last day the ad shows, YYYY-MM-DD, inclusive.
placement_fields.weight: Rotation share within the slot. Two ads weighted 2 and 1 split views roughly 2:1. Use 1 unless an advertiser pays for a larger share.

directory_fields.id: Unique permanent id, same rules as above.
directory_fields.category: Must exactly match a category heading on the homepage: 'Plumbers & heating', 'Electricians', 'Roofers', 'Skip hire', 'Cleaners', 'Solicitors'.
directory_fields.name: Business name shown on the card.
directory_fields.phone: Optional. Shown as a tap-to-call link.
directory_fields.url: Optional. Business website - clicks are tracked.

config_fields.tracker_base: Your ads Worker URL. Set - tracking is live.
config_fields.impression_sample: 1 = record every impression; 5 = record 1 in 5 (reports multiply back up). Keep at 5 on the free Workers plan; set to 1 after upgrading to Workers Paid for exact counts.

_docs.how_to_add_an_advertiser: 1) Upload their banner to assets/ads/. 2) Copy the template block below into 'placements' (or 'directory'), fill it in, delete the leading underscore from the key name is NOT needed - just add it as a normal object in the array. 3) Commit. The ad appears on the next deploy and disappears itself the day after 'end'.

placements.advertiser: TEMPLATE - copy this block, change every field, leave this one here
placements.alt: Describe the advert for screen readers

directory.name: TEMPLATE - copy this block, change every field, leave this one here
directory.blurb: One sentence about the business, about 90 characters.
